phases.name: Year 1
phases.subtitle: Explore
phases.description: Introduction to fashion industry and textile science.

milestones.label: Explore fashion industry
milestones.description: Survey of the global fashion industry including design, merchandising, and sustainability.

milestones.label: Master textiles
milestones.description: Fiber properties, yarn construction, fabric structures, and textile testing.

milestones.label: Develop design skills
milestones.description: Color theory, composition, and visual design for fashion illustration.

milestones.label: Build FCS foundations
milestones.description: Professional foundations, consumer behavior, and cultural identity in fashion.

phases.name: Year 2
phases.subtitle: Engage
phases.description: Patternmaking, CAD, and merchandising develop core skills.

milestones.label: Master flat pattern design
milestones.description: Pattern drafting, garment construction, and muslin prototypes.

milestones.label: Learn CAD for fashion
milestones.description: CLO 3D, Adobe Illustrator for technical flats and digital pattern development.

milestones.label: Analyze retail buying
milestones.description: Buying mathematics, merchandise planning, and vendor negotiation.

milestones.label: Study marketing
milestones.description: Marketing strategy, digital marketing, and brand management for fashion.

phases.name: Year 3
phases.subtitle: Develop
phases.description: Global sourcing, visual merchandising, and advanced design.

milestones.label: Study global sourcing
milestones.description: International sourcing, trade regulations, ethical manufacturing, and sustainability.

milestones.label: Master visual merchandising
milestones.description: Store design, window displays, and experiential retail environments.

milestones.label: Complete advanced design studio
milestones.description: Draping, tailoring, and collection development with tech packs.

milestones.label: Study fashion forecasting
milestones.description: Trend research, color forecasting, and seasonal market analysis.

milestones.label: Complete 200-hour internship
milestones.description: Required 200-hour internship at a fashion company. Min 2.30 GPA required.

milestones.label: Present capstone collection
milestones.description: Design and present a cohesive fashion collection at CAES Fashion Show.

milestones.label: Study fashion entrepreneurship
milestones.description: Business plans, e-commerce, and brand building for fashion startups.

milestones.label: Build professional portfolio
milestones.description: Portfolio curation, digital presence, and industry networking.
